heading: Requests for military assistance to enforce prohibition in certain emergencies
label: 175a Requests for military assistance to enforce prohibition in certain emergencies
text: The Attorney General may request the Secretary of Defense to provide assistance under in support of Department of Justice activities relating to the enforcement of in an emergency situation involving a biological weapon of mass destruction. The authority to make such a request may be exercised by another official of the Department of Justice in accordance with .section 382 of title 101section 175 of this titlesection 382(f)(2) of title 101See References in Text note below.1
